sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n50881" key="i)pwtri/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἰπ-ωτρίς</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ίδος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n50881.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">for pressing in</tr_> dislocated joints, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">σπάθη</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Heliod.</author> </bibl> </cit> ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0722.tlg001:49:32:4" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Orib.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">49.32.4</biblScope> </bibl> and <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0722.tlg001:17:9" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">17.9</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
